spoken: You're a small seller researching competitor prices. Your agent opens eBay, searches wireless earbuds. The sieve maps every element on the page. No LLM. No vision model. Zero tokens.
Product titles. Listing prices. Seller ratings. Shipping details. Every element structured and named. Ready for your agent to extract and compare.
Now a completely different site. A state park reservation system.
Different layout, different purpose. The sieve maps it just the same. Over a hundred elements, detected instantly.
Park name. Available dates. Booking controls. Your agent understands this page too. No retraining. No new prompts.
The sieve sees the page. The glossary names every element. Your agent knows what to click, what to read, what to compare. LeftGlove plus OpenClaw. Deterministic page understanding for AI agents.
